creator: j.suenram@it-ngo.com
text:
(In reply to j.suenram from comment #19)
Had a case about this at Ubiquiti. They state about this:

From what I have observed, if a frame with the specific MAC address (00:00:5e:00:01:cc:01) traverses the switch, it will be correctly learned by the switch. However, if such a frame does not pass through, the MAC address won't be populated in the switch's forwarding table.


So I guess, they don't see any fault on their side about this and point to this bug....
